amendment.description: To place reasonable limits on contributions to Super PACs which make independent expenditures.

action.text: Amendment SA 5451 ruled out of order by the chair.
Motion to waive all budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 5451, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 45 - 53. Record Vote Number: 148.
Point of order that the amendment violates section 313(b)(1)(c) of the CBA raised in Senate with respect to amendment SA 5451.
Amendment SA 5451 proposed by Senator Sanders to Amendment SA 5453. To place reasonable limits on contributions to Super PACs which make independent expenditures.
